modules.quote: The site should not feel like it is asking for a job. It should feel like a careful public notebook.

modules.title: Everything visible should remain editable.
modules.markdown: Every section on this site is meant to stay modular. Headings, descriptions, link groups, writeups, PDFs, images, and supporting files all belong to structured content files rather than hardcoded copy, so the site can evolve without reworking the code every time the record changes.

links.label: Start with Refract
links.description: The most complete integrated systems project on the site.

links.description: A short explanation of the session-centered design logic.

links.label: Open the MRI project

recommendationsNote: Recommendation letters are intentionally de-emphasized. They live here as supporting records, not as the thesis of the site.
heroEyebrow: Research systems · evaluation · medical ML · careful engineering
heroBody: Projects, notes, archive records, and supporting documents compiled in one place.
heroTitle: A public archive for projects, research, and writing.
